title: PM Modi departs for New Delhi after concluding two-nation visit to France, Slovakia
content: Modi addressed the Indian diaspora earlier in the day and said India is emerging as a "trusted partner" to the world

title: Telegram evolved into ‘new dark web’: Centre
content: Relying upon an I4C assessment, the government says the app’s architecture and privacy features have made it a preferred tool for cybercriminals, fraud networks, extremist and terror groups, and operators involved in examination paper leaks

title: Indira Canteen tops Kochi Corpn.’s Budget wish list
content: Among the Corporation’s key demands are a 190 MLD water treatment plant, a waste-to-energy project, road projects to improve mobility, and the Vembanad Lake Rejuvenation Mission

title: PM Modi meets leading CEOs in France, discusses plans for India
content: The discussions with the CEOs of the French companies focused on strengthening cooperation across sectors ranging from shipping and logistics to railways, construction and artificial intelligence.

title: Sikkim’s home-grown skincare brand enters Bhutan market
content: Founded in 2019, Agapi has been producing handcrafted natural skincare products inspired by the State’s rich biodiversity

title: Woman ends life; husband, in-laws held for dowry harassment
content: The police investigation revealed that members of the groom’s family allegedly began to demand 50 grams of gold from Vishakha’s parents soon after the marriage

title: Mallathahalli residents say flooding fears are back as drain remains blocked
content: According to residents, the flooding started after a natural rainwater flow path in the area was disrupted, causing stormwater to accumulate during periods of intense rainfall

title: Notices issued to 30 wayside eateries in Kochi after inspection finds unhygienic conditions
content: The action followed a joint inspection drive by the district Health department, Kochi Corporation and the Food Safety department. Two outlets were ordered to shut down

title: Forum seeks probe into ‘irregularities’ at Sanskrit varsity
content: The letter submitted to the Governor alleges irregularities in the use of funds, faculty appointments, admissions to PhD and other programmes, and the construction of the student amenities centre and auditorium on the main campus

title: Shiv Sena (UBT) issues show cause notices to six MPs for failing to attend parliamentary board meet
content: The action comes amidst speculation that the party is set to split again; one of the MPs, Omraje Nimbalkar, still undecided; rebels to meet Shiv Sena chief Eknath Shinde on June 21, but merger unlikely this week

title: Environmental clearance for Brigade housing project in Pallikaranai revoked
content: The State Environment Impact Assessment Authority found that the company had commenced construction without obtaining mandatory permission from the Tamil Nadu State Wetland Authority

title: CM Omar Abdullah reviews preparations for annual Pandit pilgrimage in Kashmir
content: Officials said the administration expected an uptick in the number of devotees this year, after a recent successful tour of multiple groups of Pandits to Kashmir to assess the degree of normalcy and dip in militant violence

title: Kerala’s health machinery goes all out to keep Nipah in check
content: Nipah has once again struck the northern district of Kozhikode in Kerala, with one person testing positive for the zoonotic disease. An attempt to understand the complexities of the disease and the efforts to contain it through interactions with medical experts and relatives of the patient.

title: Maharashtra local authorities biennial election records 99.02% voter turnout
content: The highest turnout was recorded in Bhandara-cum-Gondia, where all 457 voters cast their ballots, achieving 100% polling.

title: Students face technical glitches while applying for free bus passes in Karnataka
content: After assuming office as Chief Minister on June 3, Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar announced a free bus travel scheme for students studying across Karnataka.

title: Students develop AI solutions for document retrieval,  healthcare, and traffic management
content: The hackathon was conducted as part of the Tamil Nadu Skill Development Corporation’s Naan Mudhalvan programme

title: HC grants govt. two weeksto file affidavit on Phase II of seawall construction
content: The ₹404-crore seawall project from Puthenthode to Manassery was inaugurated on March 7; petition, filed by Chellanam-Kochi Janakeeya Vedhi, seeks measures to address sea incursion

title: PM Modi in Paris highlights: Prime Minister departs for New Delhi after concluding two-nation visit to France, Slovakia
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi said, "From creating the world's largest digital identity system to the world's largest digital payments platforms, we are using technology at a massive scale for financial inclusion, education, telemedicine...,".

title: Maharashtra govt seeks to get mining rights for six iron ore mines in Gadchiroli
content: Over 40 mineral blocks in the State are ready for auction, and the process for 14 of the 34 has already started

title: W.B. Assembly session begins with Governor address, Budget on June 22
content: Governor Ravi in his 20-page address, commended the State government’s decision to strengthen border infrastructure and provide land to the BSF for erecting barbed-wire fencing along the W.B.- Bangladesh border

title: U.P. CM Adityanath accuses SP and Congress of nepotism, corruption
content: He was speaking during a public gathering in Unnao where he inaugurated and laid the foundation stones for 101 development projects valued at over ₹570 crores

title: Meeting with government Secretaries: Pinarayi accuses Governor of violating constitutional conventions
content: The Chief Secretary has written to Lok Bhavan expressing the government’s dissatisfaction with the holding of such a meeting, says Chief Minister's Office

title: Guntur railway station subway to remain closed till June 30 for seepage mitigation works
content: Officials to take up expansion of the existing sump and allied infrastructure works designed to improve drainage and prevent water accumulation in the subway, particularly during the monsoon

title: Jagan promises greater role for party cadre when YSRCP comes to power in A.P.
content: Public dissatisfaction with the ruling coalition government is steadily increasing, says the YSRCP president

title: A.P. govt. eyeing ₹20,000-crore investment in rare earth mineral processing sector, says Minister
content: With 13 tonnes of gold reserves, Jonnagiri project in Anantapur district will soon enter the commercial production phase, says Excise Minister Kollu Ravindra

title: Former Sports Minister Aroop Biswas appears before police after evading three summons
content: This comes a day after Lionel Messi’s team member wrote to the police accusing Mr. Biswas for the fiasco at the event

title: ‘Diesel shortage’ is hurting farmers, aqua sector and auto drivers in A.P., alleges YSRCP
content: The diesel shortage is forcing farmers and transport operators to spend hours in queues at fuel stations, says Nagi Reddy

title: Govt. will ensure remunerative prices for tobacco farmers in A.P., says Minister
content: The Chief Minister has advised companies to procure tobacco at a minimum price of ₹200 per kg, says Gottipati Ravi Kumar

title: Youth missing case: court orders preserving of CCTV footages of Krishnalanka police station
content: The court also directs production of Call Data Records of the mobile phones of the victim and his mother

title: Union Minister calls for village-level crop planning to boost farmers' income in A.P.
content: Committees comprising progressive farmers, scientists, agriculture and horticulture officials will be formed at the village level to prepare scientific crop plans, says  Pemmasani Chandra Sekhar

title: ‘Kafir screenshot’ case: Vadakara court grants police two-day custody of DYFI leader Jithin Bhaskaran
content: The prosecution submitted that custodial interrogation was necessary to ascertain whether Mr. Bhaskaran had used a computer or any other digital device to create the disputed screenshot and to recover electronic evidence relevant to the investigation.

title: Man 'ends life'; police harassment alleged
content: The victim, son of MRPS leader, alleged police harassment reportedly in a selfie video before taking the extreme step

title: Tamil Nadu government to look for new airport site instead of Parandur
content: TVK is not against development; why should waterbodies, cultivable land be destroyed to build an airport for Chennai, asks Minister for Energy Resources and Law R. Nirmalkumar

title: Hakki Pikki people stranded in Mozambique returning to India on Friday
content: The High Commission of India in Mozambique responded to their plea and assisted in getting their documents

title: India, Germany Strengthen Renewables Partnership For Energy Security
content: With India and Germany focusing on improving their energy security, decreasing dependence on imports of fossil fuel, and moving towards sustainable development, the two nations are once again collaborating in the field of renewable energy.

title: As Iran Deal Kicks In, US Gas Prices Dip Below $4 For 1st Time Since March
content: The average US price for a gallon of gas fell below $4 on Thursday, hitting a level not seen since the first full month of the war with Iran and providing a bit of relief to consumers squeezed by soaring costs.

title: PM To Release PM-Kisan Installment Tomorrow, Benefiting 9.5 Crore Farmers
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will release the 23rd installment of the PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi from Tarakeswar in West Bengal's Hooghly district on June 20, marking PM Kisan Utsav Diwas across the country.

title: "Smell The Reality": JD Vance Slams Israel For Criticising Iran Deal
content: Israel and the US jointly launched the war against Iran on Feb. 28, closely coordinating the more than month long military operation.

title: US Lifts Iran Ports Blockade Ahead Of Swiss Ceremony
content: The signing of the deal by Trump and Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian set in motion a 60-day period for talks on wider issues between the two foes, including the Iranian nuclear programme.

title: Crippled By Delays, Pakistan's Ambitious Submarine Programme Gasps For Breath
content: A total of eight Hangor-class submarines were to be acquired under the deal signed by Pakistani and Chinese authorities during Chinese President Xi Jinping's visit to Islamabad in April 2015.

title: India's Artificial Intelligence Data Centres Plan May Hit 'Heat' Hurdle
content: The report, 2026 Global Analysis of Planned Data Centres for Physical Climate Risk and Resilience, analysed 2,595 planned data centres worldwide to assess their exposure to direct climate damage.

title: Weather Highlights: Intermittent Rain, Thunderstorm Across Delhi-NCR Till June 21, Says Weather Office
content: Weather Today, Delhi-NCR Rain Alert Live Updates: Delhi stays pleasant with temperatures below normal and AQI in satisfactory range

title: Drunk Man Beats Wife, Shaves Her Head, Forces Her To Drink Urine
content: Videos of the incident showed the accused repeatedly slapping and kicking her, shaving her head, and smearing a black substance on her face and body.

title: Beyond Teesta: How China's River Projects Could Shape Bangladesh For Decades
content: The project includes major river dredging, construction of embankments, construction of reservoirs, development of an irrigation system, prevention of erosion and the development of a hydrological monitoring system.

title: 'PM Worried About Broken System': Ram Temple Committee Chief On Donation Row
content: The Uttar Pradesh government has formed an SIT to probe the alleged theft of donations to Ram Temple in Ayodhya.

title: Trekking To Celebrate Birthday, Man Dies After Falling Into Lonavala Gorge
content: Reports indicate that the tragedy occurred when he lost his balance due to the damp, slippery surface at the site.

title: Team Thackeray Rebellion And A Trip To Delhi: Inside Story
content: The drama began on Tuesday, June 16, when the six MPs quietly departed from various cities in Maharashtra, completely evading local intelligence networks and the Mumbai media. Sources said they were then flown to Delhi on chartered flights.

title: 40-Year-Old Man Shot At In Park In Delhi's Nizamuddin Area: Cops
content: A 40-year-old man was shot and wounded in a park in southeast Delhi's Nizamuddin area on Thursday night, police said.

title: Congress Bags Extra Seat In Karnataka Upper House Polls, Cross-Voting Suspected
content: The Congress won five of the seven seats, preventing the BJP and JDS combine from winning more than two seats.

title: Mujhe Bahut Khushi Hui: Macron's Goodbye In Hindi To PM Modi At G7
content: In a remarkable departure from standard diplomatic protocol, French President Emmanuel Macron gave Prime Minister Narendra Modi a warm and unusual farewell in Hindi at the end of the Indian leader's visit, drawing attention with his effort to address

title: 'Unfortunately, there isn't a slot': Ex-India captain's blunt verdict on Ishan Kishan
content: Former captain Krishnamachari Srikkanth sees Test potential in Ishan Kishan, currently sidelined by a packed Indian team. He also highlights Yashasvi Jaiswal as an all-format player deserving more white-ball chances. Srikkanth notes the difficulty in selection due to top-order talent and calls for continuity in team choices for domestic performers.

title: Watch: Crowds scatter as shots ring out in New York's Times Square
content: A shooting incident in New York's Times Square on Thursday resulted in one juvenile suspect being taken into custody and a firearm recovered. Video captured two individuals firing weapons before fleeing the scene. Authorities are actively searching for additional individuals involved in the incident, which occurred without reported injuries.

title: Why engineers in Meta's AI unit, built for it's key employee, are calling it a 'mess'
content: Meta's new Applied AI unit, built to power Mark Zuckerberg's $14.3 billion bet on chief AI officer Alexandr Wang, is in open revolt. The 6,500 engineers drafted into the months-old team call the work "soul-crushing" and a "gulag," with one hijacking a company livestream to insult an executive. Amid 8,000 layoffs and a worker-surveillance backlash, even CTO Andrew Bosworth admits Meta's AI rollout was "atrocious." Here's why morale collapsed.

title: HDFC said to have put freeze on TMC account, Mamata Banerjee's faction denies it
content: Former West Bengal sports minister Aroop Biswas requested HDFC Bank to freeze the Trinamool Congress's account, citing a dispute over party control following his removal as treasurer. The bank reportedly placed a debit freeze on the account, which holds Rs 535 crore, though the party disputes this claim.

title: Dell CEO Michael Dell makes one of largest public university donations in US history
content: Michael Dell has gifted a staggering $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin, propelling the creation of a groundbreaking AI-native hospital and research campus. This substantial donation, adding to his family's legacy of support, will also bolster scholarships, advanced computing, and vital medical research, underscoring Dell's enduring connection to his alma mater.

title: How Sundar Pichai 'cheered up' staff when ex-Microsoft CEO said Chrome 'a rounding error'
content: Google CEO Sundar Pichai revealed how he motivated the Chrome team after Microsoft's ex-CEO Steve Ballmer dismissed the browser as a "rounding error." Pichai used the criticism to inspire his team, emphasizing that aggressive iteration and ambitious goals led to Chrome's eventual dominance as the world's most-used browser.

title: Only 3 of Sena UBT's 9 Lok Sabha MPs turn up for party meet in Delhi
content: Six of Shiv Sena (UBT)'s nine Lok Sabha MPs have reportedly shifted allegiance to the Eknath Shinde-led faction, failing to attend a party meeting after writing to the Speaker to form a separate group. Citing ideological deviations and fear of a merger with Congress, the rebel MPs are expected to formally join the Shinde camp next week.

title: Sacrifice of family during Covid drives success of Under-19 skipper
content: A young cricketer from Chambal, Yashbardhan Singh Chauhan, has been appointed India Under-19 captain. His journey began with a costly cricket bat purchased during the Covid lockdown, a symbol of his father's faith. This bat, now a talisman, has helped him repay that sacrifice with runs and resolve, leading him to national duty.

title: Eagles, 49ers linked with blockbuster trade move for Raiders star Maxx Crosby
content: Speculation is rife about Las Vegas Raiders star defensive end Maxx Crosby potentially joining the San Francisco 49ers or Philadelphia Eagles. Despite his recent hefty contract, insiders report significant interest from both teams for him. Crosby’s ability to bolster a defensive line especially with major injury concerns to key players like Nick Bosa makes him an attractive albeit expensive acquisition for Super Bowl contenders like the 49ers and the Eagles.

title: Cristiano Ronaldo’s sister fuels Portugal controversy with Bruno Fernandes swipe
content: Portugal’s 1-1 draw with DR Congo has created fresh controversy. Cristiano Ronaldo’s sister, Katia Aveiro, drew attention after liking a post criticizing Bruno Fernandes, while Ronaldo himself continues to face questions over his performance. Roberto Martinez has defended his decision to keep Ronaldo on the field, but debate around Portugal’s start to the World Cup is only growing.

title: Odell Beckham Jr. trolled online over reports linking him to Polyxeni Ferfeli
content: New York Giants wide receiver Odell Beckham Jr. was reportedly dating Greek model Polyxeni Ferfeli back in 2017-2018. Her name has gone viral online in 2026 because it sounds similar to prescription drug names. This has led to widespread social media discussion and humorous comparisons to several other drugs like Xanax. Polyxeni Ferfeli is not a medication but a given name and surname. As referenced by ResearchGate examples.

title: 'We will not accept if ...' - Iran Supreme leader's first reaction on deal with US
content: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei authorized a memorandum of understanding with the US, despite personal reservations. He granted approval after receiving assurances that Iran's rights and the "Resistance Front" would be protected. The agreement, signed by both presidents, aims to end hostilities and pave the way for further negotiations.

title: In blow to Congress, Jharkhand cross-voting hands NDA-backed Parimal Nathwani Rajya Sabha seat
content: NDA-backed Independent Parimal Nathwani secured a Rajya Sabha seat from Jharkhand, defeating Congress's candidate and exposing INDIA bloc divisions.  Meanwhile, the ZPM comfortably won Mizoram's lone Upper House seat.  Contests in MP, Karnataka, and Rajasthan concluded unopposed with BJP and Congress securing seats.

title: Indian citizen charged with stabbing another Indian citizen to death in Southall
content: An Indian national, Navjot Singh, faces murder charges in London. He is accused of fatally stabbing Gurbhej Singh outside a shop in Southall. Navjot Singh also faces charges for wounding another man and possessing a knife. He has been remanded in custody. Police continue their investigation into the incident.

title: Omar Abdullah cabinet expansion delay stirs NC rumblings, BJP taunts
content: Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah faces internal pressure from his National Conference party to expand his cabinet, with some members expressing concerns about the performance of current ministers. Opposition BJP claims the delay is due to fear of the NC government collapsing if more berths are filled, a notion the NC dismisses as a bluff.

title: Jammu & Kashmir government staffer dismissed over terror links
content: Jammu and Kashmir Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha has dismissed Mohammad Shafi Malik, a Power Development Department inspector, for alleged terror links. Malik is the ninth government employee terminated this year and faces charges including murder and attempt to murder. This action is part of an ongoing crackdown on terror infrastructure within government institutions.

title: How Trump’s policies are turning US dream into a nightmare for Indian students
content: For years, the path has been established - study in the US, get a job there, and eventually vie for a green card that gives American citizenship. That dream is slowly turning into a nightmare with frequent policy changes, immigration restrictions, heightened uncertainties.

title: ‘I Love Pakistan’ writing found inside vessel at Cochin Shipyard
content: Authorities in Kochi have initiated an investigation after a message proclaiming "I Love Pakistan" was discovered etched inside a vessel at Cochin Shipyard. Shipyard officials lodged a complaint, prompting police to record statements from maintenance workers and scrutinize records. The sensitive nature of the shipyard, which services naval assets, underscores the seriousness of the inquiry.

title: What Iran and Ukraine reveal about the importance of 'Atmanirbhar' defence push
content: Global conflicts highlight defence self-reliance, with Iran and Ukraine showcasing resilience through domestic production. India, already prioritizing indigenous defence capabilities, leverages a diverse ecosystem of missiles, aircraft, and naval systems. This tailored approach, proven in Operation Sindoor, emphasizes asymmetric warfare and export potential, fostering strategic autonomy and economic growth through a unified national effort.

title: 'Cross-voting' hits NDA: How 12 votes changed Karnataka MLC election battle
content: Karnataka Congress secured a significant victory in the Legislative Council elections, winning five out of seven seats. Allegations of cross-voting from BJP and JD(S) ranks bolstered Congress's numbers beyond expectations. This win provides a crucial boost for Chief Minister D K Shivakumar's government, highlighting support for its welfare initiatives.

title: 'You'll be criticised for captaincy as well': Gavaskar's candid verdict on Gill
content: Shubman Gill's exceptional batting form continued with a magnificent 154, leading India to an ODI series win against Afghanistan. His stellar performance, coupled with a strong showing from young pacers like Gurnoor Brar, earned praise from Sunil Gavaskar, who highlighted the positive impact of personal form on captaincy.

title: From trade talks to seafarers' security in Middle East: Foreign Secy on PM Modi's France visit
content: Prime Minister Modi's G7 visit saw significant progress on trade deals, with interim agreements nearing finalization with the US and EU, and a CEPA with Canada targeted for year-end. Discussions also focused on West Asian peace, maritime security, and the safety of seafarers.

title: Jharkhand RS poll defeat: Who ditched Congress - its own MLAs or INDIA bloc allies?
content: Congress suffered a significant Rajya Sabha election defeat in Jharkhand, losing a seat despite having the required MLA support. The NDA-backed Independent candidate Parimal Nathwani secured victory, highlighting alleged cross-voting and a breakdown in coordination among INDIA bloc allies. This setback follows similar electoral challenges for the Congress in Bihar and Himachal Pradesh.

title: Italian PM Georgia Meloni's 9-year-old daughter with ex-partner Andrea Giambruno
content: Italian Prime Minister Georgia Meloni attended the G7 Summit with her daughter Ginevra Giambruno. The nine-year-old's presence alongside her mother captured public attention. Ginevra is the daughter of Meloni and former journalist Andrea Giambruno. Their relationship ended in 2023. Meloni has also been linked with Elon Musk, though he denied any romance.

title: 'Look within': INDIA bloc ally hits back as Congress cries 'dhoka' after RS setback
content: CPI(ML) Liberation has denied allegations of cross-voting in the Jharkhand Rajya Sabha election, stating both its MLAs voted for the Congress candidate as decided. The party criticized the Congress for failing to secure its own legislators' support and warned that blaming allies could harm the INDIA bloc.

title: 'Mere 70 runs kam kar diye': Ishan Kishan's playful dig at Shubman Gill
content: India achieved a dominant 170-run win against Afghanistan in the second ODI. Shubman Gill and Ishan Kishan scored centuries, forming a significant partnership. This victory gives India an unassailable 2-0 lead in the three-match series. The focus now shifts to the final ODI as India aims for a clean sweep.

title: Armed with new sub, Pak mulls presence in Bay of Bengal for first time since 1971
content: Pakistan is signaling a sustained naval presence in the Bay of Bengal with its new, advanced submarine, PNS Hangor. This move, coupled with warming ties with Bangladesh, marks a significant shift in Pakistan's maritime strategy. The technologically superior submarine, built in China, enhances Pakistan's underwater capabilities, potentially altering the strategic balance in the eastern Indian Ocean after over five decades.

title: Magnus Carlsen suffers another Indian setback as Arjun Erigaisi stuns world No. 1
content: Indian Grandmaster Arjun Erigaisi stunned World Champion Magnus Carlsen at the FIDE World Rapid and Blitz Team Championships. Erigaisi capitalized on a late blunder by Carlsen to secure a crucial victory for Team MGD1. This win highlights the rising prowess of India's young chess talents, with Arjun joining the ranks of players challenging the world's best.

title: 'Chhatron Ki Goonj': Cong launches platform for students; Rahul shares video
content: In a passionate call to action, Rahul Gandhi invited students and aspiring professionals to support the 'Chhatron Ki Goonj' initiative by signing an online petition. This campaign targets the pressing issues of exam paper leaks, educational challenges, soaring tuition fees, and the alarming rate of unemployment.

title: 5 men gang-rape woman; doctors remove bullet, stone and wood from private part
content: A woman in Begusarai, Bihar, was allegedly gang-raped by five men who broke into her home. The attackers reportedly locked her husband away before assaulting her, leaving her with severe injuries. Doctors later removed a bullet, stone, and wood from her private part.

title: Meet football fan who stands like a statue for 90 minutes
content: DR Congo's iconic 'statue fan', Lumumba Vea, missed their World Cup opener against Portugal due to Ebola quarantine. Famous for his motionless tribute to Patrice Lumumba, his absence was noted. Fortunately, he's expected back for their next match, a welcome sight for fans after the team's surprising 1-1 draw.

title: TMC implosion, NCP split and Congress question: Why 'ghar wapsi' may not be the answer
content: Priyanka Mukherjee is an Assistant News Editor at The Times of India, where deadlines rarely slow down. Often juggling breaking news, long-form explainers and the everyday chaos of the newsroom, she is usually managing stress, chasing clarity and trying to log off on time (rarely successful). She also cares deeply about stories around women’s rights and social change, while two very opinionated dogs make sure she never truly switches off. Read More

title: Can 6 UBT MPs be disqualified for skipping meet? Experts differ
content: a 'whip' issued by party chief is a valid ground to disqualify six members of the party . sena UBT members have broken away from the party by not attending the meeting . legal experts differ, with some holding that disqualification applies only to the actions of lawmakers inside the House .

title: Iran petroleum minister to visit next week
content:
Image: X@/roydadnaft

NEW DELHI: With the US-Iran interim peace agreement, Tehran is hoping to emerge as a top supplier to India again and is sending petroleum minister Mohsen Paknejad here next week for a Brics meeting, officials said, reports. He is likely to have a bilateral meeting with counterpart Hardeep Puri, but this is yet to be confirmed. Iranian ambassador to India Mohammad Fathali told a news agency Thursday that India required reliable, stable and affordable energy supplies, and Iran possessed capabilities to meet these needs. If sanctions were lifted, he said, there was no doubt Iran could once again become one of India's "principal oil suppliers".

End of Article

title: As Shiv Sena turns 60 today, rival camps set for verbal joust
content: the party will have a showdown at the party's foundation day events in Mumbai on friday . 'Operation Tiger' is now almost complete and the merger of rebel Sena UBT MPs with the deputy CM Eknath Shinde-led Shiv Sena said to be a formality .

title: Significant progress already made: MEA on interim US FTA
content: india-US interim free trade bilateral agreement in final stages . govt says significant progress has already been made on the agreement . india expects the agreement to lead to sustained peace and stability in the region . the two countries are in the final stages of concluding that agreement, foreign secretary says .

title: 'Hang me': South Delhi doctor tells cops after killing house help with kitchen knife
content: Devanshi Mehta is a crime correspondent uncovering Delhi’s unseen crisis—addiction, systemic violence, and the quiet suffering of women, children, and marginalised communities. Her reporting brings nuance to the headlines, focusing on those forgotten by the system. Through deeply reported stories, she explores the human cost of crime, neglect, and broken justice. Read More

title: Individuals make up 47% of NSE owners
content: Reeba Zachariah is assistant corporate editor at The Times of India, Mumbai. She has been covering large Indian business houses such as the Tata Group. She also reports on a host of sectors like hospitality, retail, travel, liquor and consumer durables. She has been writing on mergers and  acquisitions and private equity. title: Versailles II: Trump signs Iran deal in the one place historians wouldn't recommend
content: the art of the deal met the ghost of Versailles . he signed a controversial MoU committing to help finance Iran's reconstruction . the symbolism was so on-the-nose that even Hollywood script editors would have rejected it as implausible .

title: 1 in 3 lawyers fake, Supreme Court to look at digital registry
content: a concerned Supreme Court agrees to examine a plea seeking a national digital register for advocates . the plea comes as the judiciary is occupying a central space in India's governance . about 35-40% of those practising in courts may be without genuine degrees .

title: Calcutta high court refuses to stay Ritabrata Banerjee's appointment as Bengal LoP
content: the high court declined to stay the appointment of rebel Trinamool MLA Ritabrata Banerjee as LoP . justice Krishna Rao refused interim relief and pointed out that a resolution submitted to the speaker by TMC national general secretary remained "in dispute" the court flagged an Alipore court order of June 15 that stayed the expulsion until June 30 .

title: China foreign minister set to attend Brics NSA meet in Delhi next week
content: chinese foreign minister Wang Yi will visit india next week, June 22-23 . the meeting of national security advisers of the grouping will be held in sept . india holds Brics rotational presidency this year, and will hand it over to China for 2027 .
